new_findings.title: S2 regression: routing to web__search via hot_list_alias instead of direct_llm
new_findings.detail: S2 (factual_query_direct_llm) was V in B46 (routed to direct_llm skill). In B47 it routed to web__search via hot_list_alias source, triggering empty-stop retry cycle. The idempotency question triggered web search rather than LLM-direct answer. This is a B47-specific regression: hot_list_n=10 may now surface web__search higher in the alias list for factual questions. Single observation (N=1); further investigation needed.
new_findings.hypothesis_confidence: HYPOTHESIS — N=1 observation, B46 was V with same prompt

new_findings.title: S3 router loop: describe_action called 5x without resolution
new_findings.detail: S3 (skill_discovery_request) hit max_phase_visits=5 exhausting iterations on repeated describe_action calls (skill__index_docs etc.) without emitting routing_decided. Router entered a describe-only loop without dispatching. Reply was the error string 'Router loop exceeded max iterations (5)'. This may be a regression introduced by the #337 wrapper fix or hot_list changes affecting the describe_action loop guard.
new_findings.hypothesis_confidence: HYPOTHESIS — N=1, needs trace-patch-replay to isolate cause

new_findings.title: S6 T2 unexpected skill dispatch: simple_memo_app + word_stats_demo instead of direct_llm
new_findings.detail: S6 Turn 2 ('それをコード例で示してください') triggered router to spawn simple_memo_app (which failed: 'built_app artifact not found') and word_stats_demo instead of direct_llm. The pronoun reference context ('それ' referring to list comprehension) confused the router into skill dispatch. B46 used direct_llm for T2. This is a routing regression potentially from #337 wrapper changes.
new_findings.hypothesis_confidence: HYPOTHESIS — N=1, need to check if simple_memo_app appearing in hot_list or wrapper change caused this

new_findings.title: Inline-reply path persists for S1/S5/S7 — same as B46
new_findings.detail: S1, S5, S7 continue to use chat_turn_completed_inline without spawning direct_llm skill. Reply content was rubric-satisfying but artifact checks fail. This is a known structural pattern (B46 F1) — no change in B47 for these three scenarios.
new_findings.hypothesis_confidence: HIGH — consistent across B46 and B47, same event patterns
